generated_from: 12 per-indicator extraction agents over 13 distinct indicators across origin/main + origin/claude/add-txt-indicator-format-b4FUu

operating_definitions.root: The least-common-denominator name humans use to refer to a signal. Calculated independently and decoupled from every other root in lifecycle stage 2. Internal computational complexity (Supertrend, Zoo MA, EMA crosses, ATR/sigma multipliers, raw highest/lowest) is hidden inside the root name and never decomposed in the bible.
operating_definitions.composite: A signal whose definition uses at least one root or lower-tier composite by name. Evaluated in lifecycle stage 5. Composites read post-offset boolean outputs of roots, never inspect root internals.
operating_definitions.tier: Depth from root. Tier 0 = root, tier 1 = composite-of-roots, tier 2 = composite-of-tier-1, etc.
operating_definitions.lifecycle_stage: 2 = independent root calculation. 3 = per-root offset application. 4 = visual plot render. 5 = composite evaluation. 6 = composite offset & plot. 7 = alert firing at bar close.
operating_definitions.canonical_name: <provenance>::<NAME>. Provenance is the indicator family that canonically owns the signal.
operating_definitions.decoupling_guarantee: Roots: no other named signal contaminates the calculation. Composites: reads roots only at stage 5; never inspects root internals.

indicators.title: Anish 50% 1st Combo (NR)
indicators.architecture: Two parallel signal families on confirmed bars only: Anish Stage 2/4 EMA-stack regime filter + Pocket Pivot bull/bear. Combined into Super PUP/PPD, All-Three (PP+Gap+Anish), TB/Foster transition signals via var counters. Non-repainting.

indicators.title: B2B PUP Combined 4.32
indicators.architecture: Monolithic overlay re-implementing 8 detection engines (PUP/PPD, FAUNA, Displacement, PBJ, RVOL/Pentagon, HV+D, TNT/Napalm/Charge/CONT, Combo Sets/Long1/UU). 18 numbered B2B-PUP composites S1-S18 (no S7) plus S19/S20 standalone density.

indicators.title: Heavy Combo Toggles
indicators.architecture: Aggregator that lifts 10 RVOL roots + displacement engine + 5 base combos + 15 directional combo booleans VERBATIM from heavy-pentagon, then collapses the 15 directional booleans into 3 master OR-gate plotshapes (Bull/Bear/Neutral) with 15 input.bool eligibility checkboxes.

indicators.title: Heavy PENTAGON
indicators.architecture: CANONICAL RVOL engine. Three sealed pipelines (P1 Standard / P2 Reg@Time / P3 All-Time HV) feed 10 root booleans. Internal displacement engine produces direction classifiers dispBull/dispBear/noDisp (NOT a root). Stage 5 builds 5 base co-occurrence combos x 3 directions = 15 Heavy Combo terminals.

indicators.title: HV FVG GZ1 OG THIS No tables
indicators.architecture: CANONICAL HV/GZI/FVG engine. Detects raw FVGs from 3-bar gap pattern, tags each with milestone-volume (HV) flag from 5000/252/63 lookbacks, emits HV and GZI signals on new-FVG creation. proximity-gzi-hv is a re-skin (byte-identical detection logic, only indicator() title differs).

indicators.title: HV+D ↔ PBJ ↔ USE THIS IS THE ONLY FUCKING ONE
indicators.architecture: CANONICAL PBJ/PPD/PB/Displacement source. 4 formally-decoupled pipelines: A=HV+D, B=PB/PBJ, C=USE Alarm 1293 (11 internal engines), D=Triple AND CO + B2B HV+D + UC fusion. 53 plotshapes, 16 alert(), 0 alertcondition.

indicators.title: Proximity GZI HV
indicators.architecture: Re-skin / alias of hv-fvg-gz1-og. Byte-identical to OG except indicator() title and shorttitle.

indicators.title: SQUARIFY 46 v2
indicators.architecture: Top-level fund signal. 4 explicit pipelines (A=HV+D, B+C=USE Alarm 1293 with 11 engines, D=TripleCo+B2B+UC fusion) plus TNT propulsion, Boom Hunter Omega, Heavy Pentagon → WBUSH. 46 numbered top-level composites S1-S46 plus T1/T2 opening confluence. 48 plotshapes. 2 alertconditions.

indicators.title: TNT Opening Drive OD v2 (filename says v3, internal says v2)
indicators.file_naming_drift: filename labels v3, internal indicator() title is v2; v3 features (HCT, UC, T1 RELAY, T1 STACK, en_newGate) are in tnt-od/versions/TNT_OD_v3.pine which is dated 2026-05-08
indicators.architecture: Three confluence engines (VOB ema-cross OB + ANISH swing-OB cross + FLUX swing-pullback) feed TNT 1.0 zone array. Zones drive Napalm/Charge/Return/CONT + TNT 2.0 super-zone aggregator. Parallel USE V5 pipeline produces RVOL/WMD/FAUNA/PBJ/CS1/PUP/HV1000/DISP atoms. 45 plotshapes.

indicators.title: TNT Opening Drive OD v3 (canonical with HCT/UC/T1 RELAY/T1 STACK)
indicators.architecture: TNT-OD v2 + HCT engine + UC placeholder + T1 RELAY + T1 STACK + en_newGate / gateStdMult master gate. 49 plotshapes.
indicators.note: All v2 primitives are bit-equivalent in v3. v3 is purely additive.

indicators.title: Ultra Combo v57
indicators.sibling_drift: v5 port verified 1:1 logic; only Pine version directive, library import vs inline ta.sma, comma-chain split, method-style array calls differ
indicators.architecture: Aggregator. Re-implements primitive signal definitions from PBJ/PB, F2/E3/FC cluster, RVOL Heavy Weapon, PUP/PPD, TB/Foster, ROC + LazyBear WaveTrend, displacement, FAUNA, GZ1/HV FVG. Composes 30+ tier-2/tier-3 combos. 30 plotshapes, 19 alert(), 15 alertcondition.

indicators.title: VOB Asym T3 ×6 + MutEx Lines + Claude
indicators.architecture: Six independent VOB engines (sensitivities A-F, EMA len 2500/2250/2000/1500/1250/1000) detect Volume Order Block zones from EMA fast/slow crossovers. Each emits T3 super-signal. MutEx engine renders highest-tier zones in full and degrades overlapping lower-tier zones to single mid-only lines (priorities 0-3+).

indicators.title: VOB Ladder Watch v1
indicators.architecture: Six bull-only VOB zone engines (mirror VOB Asym T3×6 bull-half). Per-tier highest-priced active-zone midpoint extracted, strict ascending walk F→E→D→C→B→A computes ladder_depth (0-6). Escalation transitions on confirmed bars fire labeled plotshapes.
indicators.distinct_from: vob_asym_t3x6_v8 — co-located in vob/ folder but unrelated output semantics

roots.plain_english: Bullish Pocket Pivot: a bar with body % up-move ≥ pp_barSize AND volume exceeds the highest red-candle volume over the last pp_lookback bars.
roots.decoupling_guarantee: Single-bar boolean over body% AND volume comparison; no reference to other named signals.

roots.plain_english: Bearish symmetric mirror of PUP.

roots.canonical_owner: anish_50_1st_combo (presumed; canonical Anish-Stage indicator may exist outside repo)
roots.plain_english: Stage 2 uptrend regime: price stacked above ordered 50/150/200 EMA cascade with 200 EMA rising vs ~1 month ago and price within band of 52-week range. Treated as a single named root despite EMA-stack internals (humans refer to 'Anish Bull Pass' as one named thing).
roots.decoupling_guarantee: Stack/range checks on bar's own data; no reference to other named signals.
roots.classification_note: Tentative root — may be reclassified to composite if a dedicated Anish-Stage indicator exposes EMA cross primitives by name. Per Anish: humans refer to 'Anish Bull Pass' as one named thing → treat as root.

roots.plain_english: Stage 4 downtrend regime: symmetric mirror of BULL_PASS.
Bullish landing zone: Zoo MA + Supertrend cross confirmed by PB&J wick filter (price wick beyond EMA ± ATR-derived band at lookback extreme with above-avg volume).
roots.decoupling_guarantee: PBJ's internals (Supertrend, VWMA, EMA, ATR) are mechanics, not roots. PBJ reads only price/volume of current and prior bars.
roots.internal_mechanics_warning: Internal Supertrend and VWMA implementations across indicators may have drifted. Byte-diff in Stage 6.

roots.plain_english: Bearish symmetric mirror of PBJ_BULL.
Pullback (non-PBJ branch of Zoo): cross-after-approach of bull-lander level created by PBJ engine; only fires if PBJ did not fire same cross.
roots.mutex_with: hvdpbjppd::PBJ_BULL on the same Zoo cross
roots.decoupling_guarantee: Internal mechanics of Zoo engine; no reference to other named signals.

roots.plain_english: Bearish symmetric mirror of PB_BULL.
Volume-rank hit (any of base 50/75/100…1000-bar volume highest, OR HEV all-time-high, OR HTF1/HTF2 ranks) co-occurring with stdev-displacement candle that opens a bull FVG.
roots.decoupling_guarantee: Volume rank + stdev-disp + FVG geometry; no reference to other named signals.

roots.plain_english: Bearish symmetric mirror of HVD_BULL.
USE-Displacement: range > N×stdev in [i_std_min, i_std_max] band, with bull FVG when Require FVG ON.
roots.decoupling_guarantee: Single-bar range vs stdev band + FVG geometry; no other named signals.

roots.plain_english: Bearish symmetric mirror.
Volume on the current bar equals the highest volume over neo_len bars.
Tier-1 directional momentum: regular & cumulative RVOL ratios both exceed floors AND body ratio ≥ floor AND directional close.
Bearish symmetric mirror.
Tier-2 directional momentum (lower thresholds, stricter body).
Bearish symmetric mirror of LONG2.
Boom Hunter Omega kernel: Ehlers HP+Filt+Peak quotient stack entry events: enter3 ∧ enter5 ∧ enter7, lone-lime, or wt2 oversold/overbought bounces.
Volume ≥ highest in 75-bar lookback (using volume[1]).
Volume ≥ highest in 150-bar lookback.
Volume ≥ highest in 500-bar lookback.
Volume ≥ highest in 1000-bar lookback.
Pivot-based S/R level engine; counts pivots/regimes/bounces/breaks; declares bull regime by counted state ≥ pp_min_count with floor gravity flag. Bear is mirror.
roots.decoupling_guarantee: Pure pivot/level engine; no other named signals.

roots.plain_english: Bearish symmetric mirror.
Bullish RVOL spike whose normalised price magnitude sits in the SAAB/Kratos band ([th_saab_kratos, th_1x)) on a green candle.
roots.drift_warning: Re-implementations across indicators may have drifted thresholds. B2B PUP comment 'Pre Mythos thresholds' suggests divergence.

roots.plain_english: Bearish symmetric mirror of SAAB.
Bullish base candle with normalised price spike in the 1x band ([th_1x, th_gs_moab)).
Bullish base candle whose normalised price spike exceeds th_gs_moab — top-tier bull.
Bearish symmetric mirror of GRAND_SLAM.
Reg@Time relVolRatio sits between th_1x and th_wtc — entry-tier neutral heavy event.
roots.namespace_collision_warning: HVDPBJPPD also has 'anyBearPent' (Penthouse — bear PB-mirror of Floor) — distinct concept under similar name. Stage 6 should rename anyBearPent → anyBear2F.

roots.plain_english: Reg@Time relVolRatio above th_wtc but ≤ th_hiroshima.
Reg@Time relVolRatio strictly above th_hiroshima — top-tier neutral heavy.
Raw bar volume sets new all-time-high vs running maxVol since bar_index 0 — Highest-Ever-Volume (HEV) event.
roots.note: Plot title is 'Nagasaki (HEV)' but canonical name is NAGASAKI.

roots.plain_english: Bullish FVG: bar 0 low > bar 2 high, bar 1 close > bar 2 high, gap-size relative to bar 2's high exceeds threshold.
Bearish symmetric mirror.
Fires on creation of a new bullish FVG that price-overlaps a prior bullish FVG within gziProximity bars; adjacent-touch counts when both are HV.

parameters.name: gziProximity
parameters.note: B2B PUP and HVDPBJPPD use 7-bar override (gz1_dist=7); Squarify uses 7.

roots.decoupling_guarantee: FVG geometry + bar-distance proximity + adjacent-touch rule; no other named signals.
roots.drift_warning: gziProximity default 6 in canonical, 7 in B2B PUP / HVDPBJPPD / Squarify. Reconcile in Stage 6.

roots.plain_english: Bearish symmetric mirror.
Fires on creation of a new bullish FVG whose formation-bar volume equals the 5000-, 252-, or 63-bar volume highest.
roots.decoupling_guarantee: Fires only on bar of FVG creation. Volume[1] vs lookback highest comparison; no other named signals.

roots.plain_english: Bearish symmetric mirror.

roots.canonical_owner: (distributed: defined in heavy-pentagon's USE V5 AND squarify AND ultra-combo AND hvdpbjppd; same definition)
roots.plain_english: Marubozu/Massive Body: directional body, body-size > 1.6×ATR(14), body/range > 0.7, vol > 1.8×SMA(volume,20).
Range Expansion: directional, range > 2.2×ATR, opposite-side wick < 0.15×range, vol > 1.8×avg.
Trend Acceleration: rising/falling 50-SMA + close-to-close move > 1.6×SMA(|Δclose|,10) in same direction + vol > 1.8×avg.
Gap-Go: open-prev-close gap > 0.9×ATR, direction match, low > prev close (or high < prev close for bear), vol > 1.8×avg. Used as FAUNA exclusion.
Trap: prev weak counter-bar (body/range ≤ 0.2) + core fired. FAUNA exclusion.
Exhaustion: prev strong counter-bar (|body| > 1.5×avgBody, vol > 1.5×avgVol) + core fired. FAUNA exclusion.
Gap-Down-Reversal: prev counter-color + GG. FAUNA exclusion.
TNT 1.0 confluence: VOB ema-cross OB + ANISH swing-OB cross + FLUX pullback all confirm in same window AND zones overlap AND volume/EMA-slope/RSI synergy gate AND min-bar-gap cooldown elapsed.
roots.note: Composite by construction (VOB+ANISH+FLUX) but per Anish 'TNT' is the human-named primitive. Treat as root.

roots.plain_english: Bearish symmetric mirror.
Opening Drive shell: session-first-bar gate. u5_od_max_bars input is anemic — no dedicated OD-window scoring primitive.
roots.note: Primitive is anemic. OD-ness comes via firstStatus_N/alertOK_N gating.

roots.plain_english: Bullish FVG-confirmed displacement bar that pierces an active opposing TNT zone level.
Displacement bar violating stored ChargeLevel; pushes new same-direction ChargeLevel to maintain alternating ladder. v4.32 fix in B2B PUP.
First retrace into still-active TNT zone after breakout, hits programmable retracement RET_TNT_PCT depth (default 100%). Single-fire per zone via returnFired flag.
EMA fast/slow crossover trigger. Bullish: ta.crossover(ema(close,len1), ema(close,len1+13)). Bearish: ta.crossunder. Each crossover spawns one VOB zone candidate.
On bullish cross, find lowest low in lookback, accumulate volume swing-low → cross bar, build zone bounded by [lowest_low, max(open,close) clamped ≥ lowest+atr_adj*0.5], push to lower_X array.
Symmetric: highest high, accumulate volume, push to upper_X array.
Bull zone invalidated when close < lower; bear zone invalidated when close > upper. Plus dedup-nuke when mid within atr_proximity.
T3 buy: exactly ONE active bull zone AND opposing bear pool > 0 AND bull zone volume > bear pool × super_mult AND close inside dominant bull zone.
Symmetric mirror.
F2-bar setup: session bar #2 with two consecutive same-direction MB candles.
E3 cluster: session bar #3 with three consecutive MB|RE|TA bars in same direction.
F2/E3 Cluster overlap: 2-of-3 cluster indicators align with overlapping price ranges between threshold-bar and sequential-bar zones inside a 20-bar window.
After ≥5 consecutive bullPass days, a 2-bar window opens; first bear-direction trigger (sPPBear / PBJ-sell / PB-sell) fires TB / TB-PBJ / TB-PB.
roots.note: Cross-ref candidate: 'EXACT COPY FROM ANISH TB FOSTER v6' comment in TNT-OD line 367 implies a separate Anish TB Foster v6 indicator may exist outside repo.

roots.plain_english: Mirror of TB after ≥5 consecutive bearPass days; first bull-direction trigger.

ROC + LazyBear WaveTrend: PBJ aligned with ROC-EMA + LazyBear WaveTrend conditions AND a Heavy-Weapon hit AND directional close. Per CHANGELOG treated as single 'ROC' root despite composite-of-mechanics structure.
roots.note: LazyBear WaveTrend internal mechanic (EMA cross primitives) is NOT a root.

roots.plain_english: Most recent active VOB bull zone at highest sensitivity tier (EMA len 2500). Mirrors vob-asym bull-half engine.
Anchor — must exist for any depth>0. EMA len 1000.
DISP variant for D2+ streak; same logic as DISP_BULL with `i_disp2_std_min=3.0` (was 5.0 in predecessor).
DISP variant for D3+ streak; `i_disp3_std_min=3.0` (was 4.0 in predecessor).

composites.plain_english: Same-bar confluence of PUP and Anish Stage 2.
Same-bar confluence of PPD and Anish Stage 4.
PUP + Gap-Up + Anish Stage 2 on the same bar.
After ≥minAnishBars consecutive Anish-Bull bars, fires one-bar pulse once followUpBars consecutive bars print PPD without Anish-Bull.
PUP fires on the current bar AND on the prior bar (back-to-back).
Body% bar with HV-FVG or GZI-FVG plus directional/neutral RVOL on prior bar.
composites.composition_summary: (gz_bullHV OR gz_bullGZI) AND body% AND (SAAB[1] OR RVOL1xB[1] OR GS[1] OR Pentagon[1] OR WTC[1] OR Hiro[1] OR Naga[1])

composites.plain_english: FVG-combo this bar AND Matrix-combo prior bar.
composites.drift_warning: B2B PUP uses lagged-AND (csNew2[1]); HVDPBJPPD canonical uses same-bar AND. Reconcile in Stage 6.

composites.composition: (PUP[1] AND PUP[2]) AND ((DISPBull AND DISPBull[1]) OR (HVDBull AND HVDBull[1]))

composites.plain_english: FVG_COMBO AND MATRIX_COMBO same-bar (canonical). Predecessor used 1-bar-lagged AND.
composites.drift_warning: Same-bar AND in canonical, lagged-AND in predecessor. Squarify still uses lagged-AND. CRITICAL drift to reconcile.

composites.plain_english: Triple AND: HV+D fires, PBJ on prior bar, USE-any on prior bar.
PingPong bull regime AND PBJ AND HW-slot.

composites.namespace_collision_warning: 'Pent' in this name collides with heavy-pentagon::PENTAGON RVOL tier. Stage 6: rename to anyBear2F.

composites.composition: (close>open) AND disp5_bull AND PBJ AND HW-slot AND (Floor OR 2F)
PBJ AND DISP AND (FAUNA OR Long1) AND HW-slot AND ((Combo AND PUP) OR (Floor OR 2F))
(Floor OR 2F) AND PBJ AND HW-slot AND Combo AND PUP AND DISP AND (FAUNA OR Long1)
((BULL_RVOL_1X OR GRAND_SLAM) OR (BEAR_RVOL_1X OR MOAB)) AND (PENTAGON OR WTC OR HIROSHIMA) AND dispBull
NAGASAKI AND ((BULL_RVOL_1X OR GRAND_SLAM) OR (BEAR_RVOL_1X OR MOAB)) AND dispBull
NAGASAKI AND (PENTAGON OR WTC OR HIROSHIMA) AND dispBull
NAGASAKI AND ((BULL_RVOL_1X OR GRAND_SLAM) OR (BEAR_RVOL_1X OR MOAB)) AND (PENTAGON OR WTC OR HIROSHIMA) AND dispBull
((PENTAGON AND WTC) OR (PENTAGON AND HIROSHIMA) OR (WTC AND HIROSHIMA)) AND dispBull

(en_HYYBull AND HEAVY_YIN_YANG_BULL) OR (en_HNBull AND HEAVY_NAGASAKI_BULL) OR (en_HNVBull AND HEAVY_NAGASAKI_VOL_BULL) OR (en_HTBull AND HEAVY_TRIDENT_BULL) OR (en_NHx2Bull AND NEUTRAL_HEAVY_X2_BULL)
(close>open) AND disp5_bull AND PBJ AND HW-slot AND (anyBullFloor OR anyBull2nd)
hvd_fire_bull AND PBJ[1] AND (csNew3_Bull OR csNew1_Bull)
det_bullNapalmCons AND PBJ[1] AND PUP[1] AND csNew3_Bull
sessBar==1 AND disp_std_mult >= t1_disp_thresh AND csNew3_Bull AND hvd_fire_bull AND sigBullRVOL1x
sessBar in [1,2] AND det_b2bPUP AND uu_any

composites.plain_english: Sequential cascade NPM → TNT → CONT all within SUDDEN_PROX bars, in-session.
composites.composition: det_contBull AND lastBullNPMVis < lastBullTNTVis < bar_index, both proximity-gated

composites.plain_english: Napalm + CS1 (FVG combo) on same visual bar.
Bespoke dyn-displacement (Engine #2, dynStdMult=5.0) + B2B + FAUNA + FVG.

composites.composition: Heavy Pentagon family (HYY OR HN OR HNV OR HT OR NHx2) AND USE V5 dispBull AND tntod_any_bull
sessBar==1 AND (GZ1 OR HV) AND (HW-set OR PBJ OR ROC OR (1stPUP AND superPUP))
(GZ1 OR HV OR both) AND anySuperBull AND PUP AND FAUNA AND DISP

composites.plain_english: Six parallel T3 super-signal engines per sensitivity tier A-F.
Per-bar boolean detecting array-size delta this bar; gated by en_zone_X and per-bar cooldown.
Count of consecutive ascending tiers F→E→D→C→B→A. 0-6 ordinal.
composites.composition: nested if-cascade over (p_f, p_e, p_d, p_c, p_b, p_a) requiring not-na AND strictly increasing

chains.plain_english: Latched while csNew2 (Matrix combo) is firing AND ≥cc_min_hits Matrix combo in window AND PBJ/PB inside window. Resets when no cs3-or-cs4.
chains.drift_warning: Reset gate tightened in canonical (cs3-or-cs4 only); predecessor reset on no-cs1-2-3-4.

chains.plain_english: Latches when ≥lsc_min_hits Long1/Long2 hits in window AND PBJ/PB inside window.

redundancy.name: FLOOR

occurrences.composition_summary: bull_pp AND PBJ AND HW-slot (= RVOL1x OR GS OR WTC OR Hiro OR (Naga AND nag_dir_bull))

redundancy.stage6_recommendation: Squarify wraps HVDPBJPPD's anyBullFloor with additional `oneOfThese` callback gate. Document as legitimate Squarify-specific gate, not drift.

occurrences.kind: Bear platform (mirror of Floor with PB instead of PBJ)

redundancy.stage6_recommendation: Rename `anyBearPent` → `anyBear2F` to free up 'Pentagon' namespace. HIGH PRIORITY — this collision was the original frustration trigger.

redundancy.name: Unified Combo (csNew3) composition
redundancy.stage6_recommendation: CRITICAL. Reconcile to one definition. Anish must decide: same-bar (more selective) or lagged (more permissive). Likely canonical is HVDPBJPPD same-bar per its updated definition.

redundancy.name: GZI proximity (gziProximity / gz1_dist)
redundancy.stage6_recommendation: Reconcile. Likely canonical is OG's 6 (smaller window = more selective).

redundancy.stage6_recommendation: Reconcile. The HVDPBJPPD predecessor 6.0 → canonical 3.0 was a deliberate loosening; B2B PUP, TNT-OD, Ultra Combo all use 5.0 — they may need to be updated to 3.0 to match canonical.

redundancy.name: RVOL ladder (SAAB/Kratos/RVOL1x/GS/MOAB/Pentagon/WTC/Hiro/Naga)

redundancy.stage6_recommendation: Delete one. Keep one with consistent line endings. Both are v4.32 with identical content.

occurrences.note: Same MB/RE/TA/GG/TR/ES/GDR formula appears verbatim in heavy-pentagon's USE V5, hvdpbjppd, squarify, ultra-combo, tnt-od, b2b-pup. Ultra Combo defines parallel fMB_b/fRE_b/fTA_b copies that are mathematically equivalent to bull_MB/bull_RE/bull_TA.

redundancy.stage6_recommendation: Designate one canonical FAUNA owner (likely heavy-pentagon's USE V5 block, or hvdpbjppd, or extract to fauna/ as standalone indicator). All others become cross-refs.

version_control_diagnosis.detail: Both labelled v4.32 with byte-identical content (line endings differ).
Date-stamped 05-04 file is internally v2; filename-only v3.pine is newer (dated 2026-05-08) and internally v3.
VOB_Asym_T3x6 and VOB_LADDER_WATCH are distinct indicators.
No per-indicator LATEST.pine, current symlink, or manifest entry.

hvd-pbj-ppd/, anish-50-1st-combo/, heavy-pentagon/, hv-fvg-gz1-og/, ultra-combo/ have CHANGELOG.md (b4FUu) but no README.md. heavy-combo-toggles/, proximity-gzi-hv/, vob/ have CHANGELOG only. Only b2b-pup, squarify, tnt-od have full README + CHANGELOG.
FAUNA, DISP A/B/C, LONG/SHORT 1/2, HV 75/150/250/500/1000, Hot Spot — all reserved input checkboxes with no engine wired. Header explicitly flags 'PHANTOM TOGGLES'.
Various unused declarations: max_bull_fvg etc., u5_od_max_bars, asym_threshold, de_escalated. Janitorial flags.
Per repo CHANGELOG.md, squarify v3 was retracted (over Pine 64-plot limit); v2 is current.
